query:
WITH old AS (
                SELECT req_status FROM input_proof_req WHERE int_request_id = $2
            ),
            upd AS (
                UPDATE input_proof_req
                SET
                    req_status = 'failure'::req_status,
                    err_reason = $1
                WHERE int_request_id = $2
                RETURNING req_status
            )
            SELECT old.req_status as "old_status!: ReqStatus"
            FROM old, upd
